scripts.prestart: node -e "const port = Number(process.env.PORT || 3000); if (!Number.isInteger(port) || port < 1 || port > 65535) { console.error('[startup] Invalid PORT; expected an integer from 1 to 65535. Railway injects PORT automatically.'); process.exit(1); } console.log('[startup] host=0.0.0.0 port=' + port + ' healthcheck=/api/health migration_mode=separate-from-web-start');"
